events.settings.subtitle: Configure event details, dates, venue, and capacity.
events.settings.doorsOpenHint: Optional — when attendees can enter the venue
events.settings.deleteEventHint: Permanently delete this event and all associated data. This cannot be undone.
events.settings.deleteNotAvailable: Contact a super admin to delete events.
events.settings.membershipPartnersHint: Partner organizations whose members can unlock special discounts. Each partner gets a unique access code.
events.settings.partnerLogoAfterCreate: You can upload a logo after creating the partner.
events.settings.partnerDeleteConfirm: Delete partner "{name}"? This will also remove all associated discounts.
events.settings.partnerCodeNote: Access codes are generated automatically. Share them with the partner organization.
events.settings.ticketDisplayHint: Customize the title and introductory text shown above tickets on the registration page.
events.settings.ticketIntroPlaceholder: Optional introductory text shown below the title…
events.settings.brandingHint: Upload event logos used in emails and other communications.
events.settings.logoIconHint: Square format, ideal for avatars and icons. Recommended: 512 × 512 px.
events.settings.logoLandscapeHint: Wide format for email headers and banners. Recommended: 600 × 200 px.
events.settings.contactInfoHint: Contact details shown to exhibitors in the portal. Exhibitors can also use the contact form to reach you.
events.settings.pagePathsHint: WordPress page slugs where each SRAtix shortcode is placed. Used for cross-linking between widgets.
events.settings.pathTicketsHint: [sratix_tickets] — Where visitors browse and buy tickets.
events.settings.pathRegisterHint: [sratix_register] — Where ticket recipients complete their details via a token link. Not the WP account signup page.
events.settings.pathMyTicketsHint: [sratix_my_tickets] — Where attendees view their tickets and QR codes after purchase.
events.settings.pathExhibitorPortalHint: [sratix_exhibitor_portal] — Self-service portal for exhibitors (profile, staff, media, analytics, logistics).
events.settings.legalComplianceHint: Edit the legal documents shown to attendees during registration. Each document opens in a new tab when the attendee clicks the consent checkbox label.
events.settings.legalEditorPlaceholder: Write or paste your legal document content here…

landing.hero.subtitle: SRAtix is a cutting-edge, API-first ticketing and event management platform purpose-built for conferences, scientific events, and robotics gatherings. Designed in Switzerland. Engineered for precision.
landing.contact.title: Get in Touch
landing.contact.subtitle: Interested in SRAtix for your next event? Leave your details and we'll reach out.
landing.contact.name: Your Name
landing.contact.success: Thank you! We'll be in touch shortly.
landing.contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
landing.contact.recaptcha: This site is protected by reCAPTCHA and the Google Privacy Policy and Terms of Service apply.
landing.features.title: Everything You Need. Nothing You Don't.
landing.features.subtitle: A modern, full-stack event platform covering the entire attendee lifecycle — from registration to post-event analytics.
landing.features.ticketing.title: Smart Ticketing
landing.features.ticketing.desc: Flexible ticket types, early-bird pricing, promo codes, group registrations, and tiered membership pricing. Powered by Stripe for secure, global payments.
landing.features.forms.title: Dynamic Registration Forms
landing.features.forms.desc: Drag-and-drop form builder with smart field library. Collect exactly what you need — dietary preferences, research interests, accessibility requirements, session selections. Forms evolve with your event without breaking existing submissions.
landing.features.checkin.title: QR Check-In System
landing.features.checkin.desc: Real-time check-in with QR code scanning, live attendance dashboards, offline mode support, and staff role management for gate operations.
landing.features.badges.title: Badge Generation
landing.features.badges.desc: Visual badge template builder with dynamic data fields. Auto-generate personalized badges with QR codes, roles, and custom branding.
landing.features.analytics.title: Live Analytics
landing.features.analytics.desc: Real-time sales velocity, attendance tracking, revenue reports, and conversion funnels. Export to CSV or integrate via webhooks.
landing.features.payments.title: Stripe Payments
landing.features.payments.desc: PCI-compliant payment processing via Stripe Checkout. Multi-currency support (CHF, EUR, USD), automatic invoicing, and refund management.
landing.features.gdpr.title: GDPR & nLPD Compliant
landing.features.gdpr.desc: Built-in consent tracking, data subject access requests, right to erasure, and Swiss data protection (nLPD) compliance from day one.
landing.features.multilang.title: Multi-Language
landing.features.multilang.desc: Full interface localization in English, French, German, Italian, and Chinese. Registration forms support per-field translations for international events.
landing.features.api.title: API-First Architecture
landing.features.api.desc: Clean REST API with OpenAPI documentation. Webhook system for real-time integrations. SDK-ready for custom clients and mobile apps.
landing.features.exhibitor.title: Exhibitor Portal
landing.features.exhibitor.desc: Dedicated exhibitor dashboard with staff management, lead scanning, and material upload. Exhibitors self-manage their presence — no back-and-forth emails.
landing.swiss.title: Precision-Engineered for Swiss Events
landing.swiss.subtitle: Built by the Swiss Robotics Association, SRAtix understands the unique requirements of Swiss conferences, scientific symposia, and industry events.
landing.swiss.hosting.title: Swiss Hosting
landing.swiss.hosting.desc: Hosted on Infomaniak infrastructure in Switzerland. Your data stays in Switzerland, subject to Swiss law.
landing.swiss.privacy.title: nLPD Compliance
landing.swiss.privacy.desc: Full compliance with the new Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (nLPD/revDSG) and GDPR for EU attendees.
landing.swiss.currency.title: CHF + Multi-Currency
landing.swiss.currency.desc: Native CHF support with automatic EUR, USD, and GBP conversion. Swiss QR-bill invoice generation.
landing.swiss.languages.title: 4 National Languages
landing.swiss.languages.desc: Full platform support for German, French, Italian, and English — reflecting Switzerland's multilingual reality.
landing.swiss.academic.title: Academic Workflows
landing.swiss.academic.desc: Purpose-built for scientific conferences: abstract submissions, session tracks, poster sessions, research interest matching, and institutional invoicing.
landing.swiss.robotics.title: Born from Real Events
landing.swiss.robotics.desc: SRAtix was built based on real pain points observed at robotics conferences and tech exhibitions — from long registration queues to manual badge handling and disconnected exhibitor workflows. Every feature solves a problem we've seen firsthand.
landing.whitelabel.title: Your Event. Your Brand. Our Engine.
landing.whitelabel.subtitle: SRAtix is designed for white-labeling and customization. Whether you're organizing a 50-person workshop or a 2,000-attendee conference, the platform adapts to your needs.
landing.whitelabel.branding.title: Custom Branding
landing.whitelabel.branding.desc: Your logo, your colors, your domain. Attendees see your brand — not ours. Full visual customization of registration pages, badges, and email templates.
landing.whitelabel.forms.title: Tailored Registration
landing.whitelabel.forms.desc: Build registration forms from scratch or use our smart field library. Forms evolve with your event requirements without breaking existing submissions.
landing.whitelabel.tenant.title: Multi-Tenant Isolation
landing.whitelabel.tenant.desc: Each organization operates in complete isolation. Your data, your staff roles, your events — fully separated from other tenants on the platform.
landing.whitelabel.integrations.title: WordPress & Beyond
landing.whitelabel.integrations.desc: Embed registration forms on your WordPress site via our official plugin, or integrate via REST API with any CMS, website, or application.
landing.whitelabel.support.title: Dedicated Support
landing.whitelabel.support.desc: From initial setup to event day operations, our team provides hands-on assistance to ensure your event runs flawlessly.
landing.whitelabel.pricing.title: Flexible Engagement
landing.whitelabel.pricing.desc: Per-event licensing, annual contracts, or full white-label deployment. We tailor the engagement model to your organization's needs and scale.
landing.srd.title: Launching at Swiss Robotics Day 2026
landing.srd.subtitle: SRAtix will make its public debut at Switzerland's premier robotics event — powering registration, ticketing, check-in, and attendee experience for 1,000+ participants.
landing.srd.organizers: Co-organized by the Swiss Robotics Association & RobotX
landing.srd.statusDesc: SRAtix is currently in active development with imminent public release. The platform is being battle-tested and refined for its first in-the-wild deployment at SRD 2026.
landing.srd.feature1: Full event ticketing with tiered SRA member pricing
landing.srd.feature2: Dynamic registration forms with robotics expertise fields
landing.srd.feature6: Stripe payments with CHF and multi-currency support
landing.app.title: SRA Event Companion App
landing.app.subtitle: The SRAtix experience extends beyond the browser. Our upcoming companion app puts the entire event in your pocket — personalized, real-time, and offline-ready.
landing.app.schedule.title: Personalized Schedule
landing.app.schedule.desc: Build your custom agenda from available sessions, workshops, and keynotes. Get smart recommendations based on your research interests and professional profile.
landing.app.networking.title: Smart Matchmaking
landing.app.networking.desc: Connect with fellow attendees, speakers, and exhibitors. AI-powered networking suggestions based on shared interests, expertise, and collaboration potential.
landing.app.live.title: Live Session Features
landing.app.live.desc: Participate in real-time polling, Q&A sessions, and audience reactions during talks. Share feedback and rate sessions as they happen.
landing.app.offline.title: Offline-First Design
landing.app.offline.desc: Full functionality even without connectivity. Your schedule, badges, and essential event data sync automatically when you're back online.
landing.app.badge.title: Digital Badge & Ticket
landing.app.badge.desc: Your ticket and personalized badge live in the app. Quick QR scan at entry, no paper tickets needed. Apple Wallet and Google Wallet integration.
landing.app.messaging.title: Attendee Messaging
landing.app.messaging.desc: Direct messaging between attendees, opt-in visibility in the attendee directory, and exhibitor lead exchange — all privacy-compliant.
landing.footer.tagline: Precision Event Technology — Made in Switzerland
landing.footer.by: A platform by the Swiss Robotics Association
landing.login.title: Sign in to Dashboard
